original_text: Institutional investor activity showed mixed signals following the earnings release. Ark Invest's Cathie Wood purchased $21.5M in Airbnb stock, buying the post-earnings dip C089. Baron Capital also highlighted Airbnb among its Q2 real estate portfolio moves C087. Competitive dynamics remain active, with Sonder securing $24.54M in new funding and amending its Marriott agreement on August 8, 2025 C086. Expedia posted strong earnings with analysts issuing higher price targets, indicating robust online travel agency sector performance C084. The current ratio of 1.23 suggests adequate near-term liquidity positioning K006.
